Remento.ad_copy: With Remento, preserving precious stories is as easy as having a conversation. They will simply speak, and Remento will do the rest. Turning their spoken words into professionally written stories. Each story is paired with a QR code that when scanned, links back to original recordings. This way, you can watch or listen to them anytime as they tell their story. 👆 Pick storytelling prompts/photos 📱 Record spoken answers
Remento.headline: 📖 Remento turns recordings into a book of written stories

Remento.ad_copy: I decided I wasn't going to miss the chance to ask so many more questions... Make history for your family. Give a loved one Remento, not a writing assignment, and their timeless stories will be captured forever for the whole family in an interactive hardcover book. Sorry, we're having trouble playing this video.
Remento.headline: Sorry, we're having trouble playing this video.

Remento.ad_copy: Want to capture your loved one's life story without the hassle of writing and typing? Introducing Remento! Tim Ferriss chose it for his mom, calling it an "A+ investment!" • 80% of life stories are never recorded - don't let that be yours!
Remento.headline: Give Remento as a gift & turn memories into a stunning interactive book.

Remento.ad_copy: Preserving the stories you love shouldn’t feel like work. With Remento, it’s as easy as talking. No typing. No tech headaches.

See why Mark Cuban invested on Shark Tank: "With Remento, you’ll always have the voices of the people you love.” Give your parent something meaningful… not homework. Remento captures their stories by voice, writes them in their own style, and turns them into a beautiful, interactive, color hardcover book for your entire family.
Remento.headline: No typing. No passwords. No tech stress.

Remento.ad_copy: Preserving the stories you love shouldn’t feel like work. With Remento, it’s as easy as talking. No typing. No tech headaches.
Preserving the stories you love shouldn’t feel like work. With Remento, it’s as easy as talking. No typing. No tech headaches.

Con Remento, preservar historias valiosas es tan fácil como tener una conversación. Ellos simplemente hablan, y Remento hace el resto: convierte sus palabras en historias escritas profesionalmente. Cada historia incluye un código QR que, al escanearlo, te lleva a las grabaciones originales. Así puedes verlos o escucharlos cuando quieras, contándote su historia. 👆 Elige preguntas o fotos para inspirar las historias 📱 Graba las respuestas habladas
Remento.headline: 📖 Remento convierte las grabaciones en un libro lleno de historias escritas

Remento captures their stories by voice, writes them in their own style, and turns them into a beautiful, interactive, color hardcover book for your entire family.

Remento.ad_copy: Todos tenemos historias que merecen ser contadas… y ahora pueden vivir para siempre. Le regalé a mi papá algo único: su propio libro de memorias hecho con @getremento. Remento aparecio en Shark Tank y funciona asi, te manda preguntas, grabás tus respuestas en video, y la plataforma convierte esa grabación en texto automáticamente.
Everyone loves stories. Preserving your family's stories shouldn’t feel like work. With Remento, it’s as easy as talking. No typing. No tech headaches.
For only $99 you get: 📝 No-Write Biographer Service 📘 Hardcover Memoir (in color!)

ElliQ.ad_copy: Because no one should feel alone. ElliQ is more than technology - she’s a companion who’s there every day to talk, laugh, and brighten your little moments. From sharing stories to telling jokes, ElliQ brings connection, comfort, and smiles right into your home.

ElliQ.ad_copy: About one year after she got the robot, Jan went to her doctor for an exam. Her resting heart rate was a few beats lower than before. On some cognitive tests, her short-term memory had improved. She came home and told ElliQ the results. “I’m glad I have you,” Jan said. “Oh, that makes my bells ring,” ElliQ said.
